title: start-scripting project config
description: Schema for config.json files created by `ss init` in an ss project directory.

active.description: The currently active experience and variation. Written by ss start, ss new, and the variation switcher.

variation.description: Slug of the active variation. 'control' means no modifications are injected.

experiences.description: All experiences defined in this project.

slug.description: Filesystem-safe identifier derived from name (e.g. 'homepage-hero-test'). Must match the directory name under experiences/.

pages.description: URL targeting rules for this experience.

editor.description: The URL opened by ss start. Set automatically when you connect.

include.description: URL targeting rules that determine where the experience runs.

exclude.description: URL targeting rules that prevent the experience from running even if an include rule matches.

variations.description: All variations for this experience. The Control variation is always first and has no directory.

slug.description: Filesystem-safe identifier. 'control' is reserved for the no-modification baseline.

modifications.description: Ordered list of modification blocks for this variation. Omitted or empty on the Control variation.

slug.description: Filesystem-safe identifier matching the block directory name.

trigger.description: When the block's JS should execute relative to page lifecycle.

selector.description: CSS selector to wait for (ELEMENT_LOADED only). The block fires when a matching element is added to the DOM.

once.description: For ELEMENT_LOADED: fire only the first time the selector matches (true) or every time a new match is added (false). Defaults to true.

dependency.description: Slug of another block in the same variation that must run first (AFTER_CODE_BLOCK only).

hide_elements_until_code_runs.description: CSS selectors for elements to hide (visibility:hidden) immediately when ss initialises, before this block's code runs. The hiding style tag is removed once the block's run() promise settles, preventing layout flash. Useful for hero sections or elements the test will replace.

resources.description: Files to include from this block directory, in import order. CSS/SCSS/SASS are imported before JS/TS so styles register before code runs. Supported extensions: .js .ts .tsx .jsx .mjs .cjs .css .scss .sass .html

audiences.description: Targeting audience definitions (reserved for future use).

cache_ttl.description: How long (in seconds) proxied static assets are served from .cache/ before re-fetching.

timeout_ms.description: Page load timeout in milliseconds for the Playwright bot-detection probe and capture.

spa.description: Re-apply modifications on every client-side route change (pushState / replaceState / popstate). Removes ss-injected nodes then re-injects HTML and re-runs the bundle after each navigation.

ssr.description: Hint that the target site uses server-side rendering (affects HTML injection strategy). Reserved for future use.

inject_jquery.description: Load jQuery 3 from CDN into every proxied page if window.jQuery is not already present.

inject_fontawesome.description: Load Font Awesome 6 Free (CSS) from CDN into every proxied page if it is not already present.

rule.description: Matching strategy to apply against the page URL.

value.description: The string or pattern to match against.

options.description: Optional flags that modify how the rule is applied.

ignore_query_string.description: Strip the query string from the URL before matching.

ignore_fragment.description: Strip the URL fragment (#...) before matching.

ignore_protocol.description: Strip the protocol (http:// / https://) before matching.
